title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and Update available
scenario: Device Home Screen displays "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons in the status box under Battery icons when a device is connected and a firmware update is available.
steps: Connect a device to the system.
Ensure a firmware update is available for the connected device.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Observe the status box located under the Battery icons.
expected: The status box under the Battery icons displays both "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons.
